description: Handbrake is a Docker-based application for video transcoding and compression, offering powerful and flexible multimedia processing across multiple platforms.
tagline: Liberate your videos and unleash infinite possibilities.
author: self
title: handbrake
release_note:
- v26.03.3 updates HandBrake to version 1.11.1.
- It keeps the jlesage HandBrake container release line current.
- The jlesage/handbrake:v26.03.3 Docker image tag was published on 2026-03-23.
